app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: Lipu pi sitelen sona pi ken kepeken AI, lon ona li jo e nasin pi alasa e sitelen pi kipisi pi lipu luka

settings.heading: nasin ante
settings.language_desc: o wile e nasin toki sina.

settings.ai_enable_desc: ona li ante e sitelen pi toki sona en/anu nasin pona kepeken toki sona sina.
settings.privacy_body_1: lon tenpo ni, ijo ale li poki lon ilo sona sina kepeken localStorage. ijo ala li tawa mi anu ilo sona ante. ijo poki li jo e: linja, toki, nasin pi ilo alasa, nasin pi alasa lon, nasin pi ilo sona, ilo API, awen suli, sitelen seli, ijo poki weka, ijo pini, alasa sin, alasa ante, ante pi lipu sina, en alasa pini sina.
settings.privacy_body_2: ilo API li lon ilo sona sina taso, li tawa ilo sona sina tawa AI kepeken nasin sina. mi lukin ala e ona. sina ken weka e ona lon tenpo ale kepeken ilo sona pi AI anpa, anu kepeken weka e ijo pi lipu ni lon ilo sona sina.
settings.privacy_body_translations: toki ante pi ilo ni en lipu open li kama kepeken AI, li ken jo e pakala. ijo pi jan musi, alasa ante, anu ante ante li tawa toki ante ala lon tenpo ale.
settings.reduced_motion_note: Linja ala li lon. Tawa pi sitelen sama confetti li weka. Tawa ni: sina open sin e ona, o weka e linja ala lon pali pi open tawa mute pi ilo sina.
notfound.heading: 404: Wile Lon Telo Suli
notfound.body: lipu ni li lon ala. tawa sin tawa lipu open.
footer.credit: Mikey Ilagan li pali e ni
party.announce_full: musi suli! sitelen Comic Sans. kule li ante ale. a — ijo lili li kama sewi! ilo lukin li nasa.
party.announce_reduced: musi suli! sitelen Comic Sans. kule li ante. ilo lukin li nasa. tawa li pini — sina pona a!
kofi.aria: Ko-fi pana e pona tawa Mikey (open e poki)
kofi.title: Ko-fi widget
about.what_body: Ni li poki pi pini pi open tawa mute, tawa wawa luka pi sitelen. O alasa e ni: sina lukin e seme, o jo e sitelen pi pona nanpa, o pana e ona lon lipu toki sina.
about.what_wcag: Toki ni li jo e WCAG 2.2 Nanpa A en AA, nasin pi kulupu mute en nasin pi lawa mute pi open tawa mute. Nanpa lili pi Nanpa AAA li lon kin tawa ni: kulupu pi open tawa mute li lukin e nasin pakala ni li suli.
about.step_1_body: o toki e lukin sina — nimi ilo, ijo, anu toki pona.
about.step_2_body: kepeken ilo sewi/anpa tawa ante e nanpa. sitelen sewi tawa lon sewi taso. weka tawa ala lukin.
about.step_3_body: o wili e ijo pona tawa sina. lipu li pona tawa toki sina.
about.step_4_body: o pana e nimi lon (p.ex. "ale:") anu AI tawa ante toki.
about.feature_ai_body: Kepeken AI tawa pali sin e pini kepeken toki sina. O kama jo e API key sina tan Anthropic, OpenAI, anu Google. Ona li awen lon ilo toki sina li tawa ala tawa mi. O pali e ona lon
about.feature_languages_body: Poki ni li lon lon toki mute pi nanpa 50 en suli, li jo e open tawa toki RTL. Mi olin e toki, kulupu, en sona toki. Pana e toki mute ni li kama utala lili, kama sona, en wile ike lili. Toki ante li kama tan AI, tawa ni: o sona e ni tawa pakala toki. O ante e pakala. O ante lon
about.feature_party_body: lon nasin ante. anpa kule. sina sona e ni la sina lukin e ni.
about.feature_a11y_label: Open Tawa Mute Nanpa Wan, AI Nanpa Tu
about.feature_a11y_body: Pali kepeken WCAG 2.2. Li jo e pali lawa, ma pi toki lon, tawa ale kepeken keyboard, open tawa linja ala, en nasin rala pi nanpa kule suli.
about.coming_heading: kama lon tenpo kama, jan pona
about.coming_auth: Google anu GitHub tawa awen lon ilo ante.
about.coming_custom: o pana e ijo sina, awen pi sina taso.
about.coming_ai: ilo AI ante: OpenAI, Google Gemini en mute.

results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_title: Pana e pona tawa ma ni
common.sponsored_body: Kama jo e sitelen pi mani pana tan jan pi ma kepeken ilo anu ma pi jan pali ilo. Nimi sona sina li awen, lon ala li lukin e sina, jan ante li sona ala e sina, nasin sona li lon ala.
onboarding.heading: Kama pona tawa A11yFred
onboarding.confirm_body: Sina tawa ala e pini pi tawa sona. Pini anu weka e linja ante?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Toki e ni: sina lukin e seme: nimi pi ilo, nimi pi pakala, anu nasin sona WCAG. Kepeken ilo pi Platform anu WCAG Level tawa pona e alasa. Kepeken Narrow Results tawa pona e alasa lon sitelen awen. Pini pi alasa li lon nasin pi wawa, lon pini li lon nasin pi ike.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Kepeken Rank Up/Down tawa nasin e pini kepeken wawa ona. Sitelen pi pini li awen lon open. Pin e pini tawa awen lon sewi lon alasa ale.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Open e wan nasin pi lukin e ona: nimi ona, nasin WCAG, sitelen sona, en nasin pi weka e ike. Pana e nimi pi ma ona tawa sitelen sona (sama ni: 'Global:'). Kepeken AI Assist tawa ante e ijo ale kepeken nasin sona sina, la copy e ijo kepeken luka wan wan anu kepeken Copy All tawa kama jo e ijo ale.
search.narrow_clear_aria: Weka e ilo lili pi nasin anu open sin
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: Pini pi ilo Native li lili ala sama pini pi ilo ilo.
search.hint_ranking: Kepeken Rank Up/Down tawa ante e nasin pi pini. Sitelen e pini tawa awen lon open.
search.hint_syntax_prefix: Kepeken +nimi tawa wile e nimi anu -nimi tawa weka e nimi (sama
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Weka e ilo lili pi nasin anu tawa sin tawa alasa ale
search.view_all_confirm_pinned_one: Pini 1 li pin anu awen lukin.

search.view_all_confirm_body_one: Ni ka awen e weka e wan lon lipu ni.
search.view_all_confirm_dont_ask: o alasa ala e ni sin

results.sort_live_hint: alasa lon tenpo ni li lon. awen li kama nanpa sin lon tenpo lili a tawa ni: sina sitelen anu sina ante e wile.
results.summary_query: Mi lukin e pali pi '{query}', pali ni li lon nasin '{sort}', li lili lon '{narrow}', {platform}.
results.summary_no_narrow: Mi lukin e pali pi '{query}', pali ni li lon nasin '{sort}', {platform}.
results.sort_smart_info: nasin nanpa pona li nanpa lon wan pi suli ike, la nanpa sina li kama. mute pi sitelen sewi li kama lon sewi a; mute pi pana tawa monsi li kama lon anpa a. ni li nasin nanpa sin.
results.sort_severity_desc: suli ike: suli mute tawa pona
results.sort_severity_asc: suli ike: pona tawa suli mute
results.sort_wcag_level_info: AAA li lon insa pi lipu ni lon nasin ante. mute ala pi AAA li lon, la mute pi AAA li ken toki e nasin pona, ala e nasin wile.
results.sort_popularity_info: lon tenpo kama, ni li awen e suli pi jan mute ale kepeken pali pi jan ale. lon tenpo ni, suli li lon tenpo pi open tawa pini ilo taso.
results.narrow_title: o lili e awen ni sin
results.rank_hint: o nanpa e awen sewi anu anpa. o sitelen sewi tawa kama lon sewi. o pana tawa monsi tawa len. (sina ken weka e ni.)
results.unpin_from_search: awen ni li awen. o weka e ni tawa kama lon awen alasa.
detail.discard_confirm_body: sina open e kama sona sin la sina weka e pane lili pi sina en ante ale pi sina kepeken ala.

detail.finding_note_hint: o pana e sona ni: ma, sona pi pakala suli, anu ijo ante pi pali ni. o open e AI Assist lon

detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: luka API li pakala anu li pini ({provider}). o lukin sin e luka sina lon Pana Nasin.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: tenpo pi kepeken mute li kama ({provider}). o awen lili la o pali sin.

help.take_tour_description: o kama sin e tawa pi kama sona la o lukin sin e nasin pi A11yFred.
help.step_1_body: Pini li kama lon tan alasa sina. Kepeken ilo nanpa pi sitelen kepeken seme la o pona e ilo pi kulupu Wep anu App Insa (mute li lon wep). Kepeken +nimi tawa ni: nimi ni li lon. Kepeken -nimi tawa ni: nimi ni li weka (e.g. keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Pini ale li jo e ilo Nanpa Sewi en Nanpa Anpa tawa ante e nanpa ona. O sitelen e pini tawa ni: ona li kama open lon open. O awen e pini lon sewi lon alasa ale.
help.step_3_body: O wile e pini pi pona nanpa mute tawa ni: ona li sama lukin sina. Pini li nanpa kepeken pona nanpa, li nanpa kepeken wawa.
help.step_4_body: Pana e nimi pi ma ona tawa sitelen sona (sama ni: 'Global:' anu 'Cart:'). Kin la AI Assist li lon, pana e nasin sona sina tawa ijo Revision Notes la AI li lipu sin e nasin ni tawa ma sina.
help.step_5_body: O kama jo e sitelen toki en pona pilin tawa lipu sona anu lipu toki sina. Kepeken Kama Jo Ale tawa ni: sina jo e awen tu lon tenpo wan.
help.shortcuts_note: Luka kipisi li pali taso ni: lawa li lon lipu pini. Kepeken ona tawa ni: sina ken tawa wawa li pana nanpa e pini, o weka ala e lawa lon lipu.
help.shortcut_e: E = Awen pini ni lon ijo ante
help.shortcut_u: U = Kama jo sin e pini ni
help.shortcut_rank_up: Shift + ↑ = Nanpa sewi e pini ni
help.shortcut_rank_down: Shift + ↓ = Nanpa anpa e pini ni
about.what_body_2_prefix: Pini sama li kama lon sitelen ale. Ilo ni li awen e sitelen sina li sama lon lipu toki ale, tawa ni: sina o pali sin ala lon tenpo ale. Poki li kama tan wawa luka pi sitelen pona, li pona sin kepeken AI tawa toki pona, sama, pona, en pali sona lukin e
about.feature_agentic_body: Kin la ni li lon: sina kepeken Claude (Anthropic), la sina ken open e Pona e Nasin Pali Sama. AI li alasa e pini ante pi tenpo pini tawa ni: ona li pona e nasin toki en wawa pi pali sina, li pali sin ala e pini ni taso.

about.examples_ath010_label: Nimi pi Ilo Tawa li toki e lukin, li toki ala e pali
about.examples_ath013_label: Nasin pi Lawa Lipu li pakala
about.examples_ath014_label: H1 li lon ala lon lipu
settings.party_confirm_heading: O open e nasin pali nasa?
settings.party_confirm_body: Ijo li kama nasa mute en ken open ala tawa mute.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Toki ante ni li kama tan AI li alasa ala kepeken jan pi toki Rohingya.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Jan Rohingya li pilin e pakala moli en weka pi pona. O kepeken toki ante ni kepeken sona, en o ante e pakala kin la sina ken.
settings.platform_all_desc: Lukin e pini ale tan wep, app insa, en lipu.
settings.platform_document_announce: Kulupu: Lukin e pini pi lipu.
settings.ranking_on: Nasin pi awen suli li lon lon esun suli ale.
settings.ranking_off: Nasin pi awen suli li lon ala.
settings.starred_results_desc: Ijo pi sitelen seli li tawa sewi lon tenpo ale, kepeken nasin ni: ona li kama lon sitelen seli.
settings.starred_results_empty: Ala li jo e sitelen seli.
settings.archived_results_desc: Ijo pi poki weka li lon anpa pi esun suli lon tenpo ale.
settings.unarchive_all: Kama Ante e Poki Weka Ale
settings.unarchive_all_done: Poki Weka Ale li Kama Ante
settings.rankings_desc: Sewi en anpa pi awen suli sina li lon esun suli. Esun suli pi awen suli sewi li kama lon open lon alasa.
settings.rankings_empty: Ilo pi awen suli li lon ala.
settings.reset_rankings_done: Awen Suli li Kama Sin Pini
settings.confirm_reset_all_intro: ni li ken ala kama ante sin.
